chunks.title: God's Past Care for Israel
chunks.reason: A unified reflection on God's historical love and guidance of Israel from Egypt.

chunks.title: Judgment for Refusal to Return
chunks.reason: A prophetic declaration of the consequences of Israel's stubbornness and rejection of God.

chunks.title: God's Reluctance to Punish
chunks.reason: An emotional monologue where God expresses His internal struggle and decision to spare Ephraim.

chunks.title: Promise of Restoration
chunks.reason: A vision of the future where Israel returns from exile under God's protection.

chunks.title: The Reality of Deceit
chunks.reason: A concluding indictment summarizing the current state of Israel and Judah's unfaithfulness.
